patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-000922: TCF3::PBX1, with EGFR, HRAS, KRAS mutations
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-002055: ID3 Glu53Ter, NCOR1 Ile1927fs, TP53 Tyr236Ser
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-000195: ADGRE5-NOL6, CDK6-Z93241.1, JAK2 V617F, DNMT3A R882H
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-002060: BCR-ABL1 (e1-a2, with a deletion of a2 exon of ABL1)
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-000233: NPM1-ALK, RAC1 Ala88Glu, and TP53 Ser215Cys
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-000168: KMT2A-MLLT3, EP300, KRAS and TP53 mutations
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-000387: BUB1-MGAT4A, CBFA2T3-ABHD12, NRAS Gln61Pro, TP53 Ile251Thr
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-000326: BCR::ABL1 (e14-a2), KMT2D Tyr1495Ter, and TP53 Arg306Ter
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-000995: Overexpression of TAL1 (no TAL1 abnormality or translocation of TAL1 locus)
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-000519: NUP214-ABL1, HNRNPC-ZNF219, NOTCH Leu1600Pro, TP53 Tyr163CysZNF219
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-000557: BCORL1 Arg784Ter, NRAS Gly13Val, and TP53 993+2T>G
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-000498: DNMT3A Arg882His, NRAS Gly13Arg, and TP53 Arg248Trp
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-001647: AML-ETO, KMT2A-AFDN, KRAS Gln61His, TP53 Ile195Thr
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-000263: RUNX1-RUNX1T1 (AML1-ETO), KIT N822K, RAD21 K330F, TP53 R248Q
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-000770: KMT2A, NRAS, PTEN, RAD21, and TP53 mutations
patientSubtypeFeatures.ACH-002059: MEF2D-HNRNPUL1 [only in PMID: 35354797. Not consistent with Karyotyping results in DSMZ]
